mano_cua.result_summary: Switch组件disabled状态存在两个bug：1)视觉bug-禁用状态无视觉区分，与启用状态外观完全相同；2)功能bug-禁用状态下Switch仍可被点击切换，disabled属性未阻止交互
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Switch component disabled state has two bugs: (1) Visual bug - no distinct disabled styling, disabled Switch appears identical to enabled Switch (both show blue when ON); (2) Functional bug - disabled Switch can still be toggled by clicking, clicking twice toggled it ON→OFF→ON. Dark mode toggle could not be found/activated on the page.
